name: Praline Popcorn Crunch
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Butter a baking sheet and prepare a large bowl for mixing.
2. Toast pecans and almonds in the preheated oven until light brown, about 10-12 minutes, or until lightly toasted.
3. In a large bowl, combine popped corn and toasted nuts.
4. In a heavy saucepan, heat sugar, margarine (or butter), 1/4 cup Praline liqueur, and corn syrup over medium-high heat.
5. Stir the mixture until it reaches 275°F (135°C) on a candy thermometer or until it achieves a soft crack stage.
6. Remove from heat and stir in the additional tablespoon of Praline liqueur and salt.
7. Pour the warm mixture evenly over the popcorn and nuts, mixing thoroughly to coat everything.
8. Spread the coated popcorn and nuts immediately onto the prepared baking sheet.
9. Let cool for 1 hour at room temperature.
10. Break into bite-sized pieces before serving.
